title: ziziphora interrupta
intro: Ziziphora interrupta, also known as Mexican oregano, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like carvacrol and thymol, exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Ziziphora interrupta include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. Traditionally, Ziziphora interrupta is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical applications, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
